common.tagline: The visual workout planner that actually feels like an app.

pwaPrompt.title: Install SableFit
pwaPrompt.subtitle: Keep your plan, reminders, and today workout one tap away.
pwaPrompt.androidReady: Your browser is ready to install the app now.
pwaPrompt.androidManual: Use the browser menu and choose Install App or Add to Home Screen.
pwaPrompt.iosShareOpenedHint: The share sheet is open. Use Add to Home Screen to finish setup.
pwaPrompt.iosShareFallbackHint: Use the browser share menu and choose Add to Home Screen.

landing.title: Build a training rhythm that fits real life, not spreadsheets.
landing.body: SableFit turns exercises, workout sessions, weekly plans, and reminders into a focused mobile PWA with bilingual content and visual exercise matching.
landing.feature1Body: Every approved exercise includes a built-in visual card so users do not choose the wrong movement.
landing.feature2Body: Group many workout sessions into repeatable plans with weekday scheduling and reminder windows.
landing.feature3Body: Open the app and see only what matters for the current day: next workout, session details, and reminder state.

authPhone.title: Phone login
authPhone.subtitle: Use Firebase OTP to unlock your private training workspace.
authPhone.helper: Use full international format, for example +84...
authPhone.missingConfig: Firebase phone auth is not configured yet. Add the Firebase web env vars to enable OTP.

marketingPlans.title: Sample workout plans
marketingPlans.subtitle: System templates across beginner, hypertrophy, strength, fat loss, and home training.

marketingExercises.title: Exercise library preview
marketingExercises.subtitle: Search anatomy-style exercise media by equipment, level, and body focus before you sign in.

installPage.title: Install SableFit
installPage.body: Add SableFit to your home screen to unlock the best reminder and push-notification experience.

todayPage.title: Today
todayPage.subtitle: Your next workout, active plan, and reminder status.
todayPage.empty: No workout scheduled for today. Activate a sample plan or build your own.

sessionsPage.title: Workout sessions
sessionsPage.subtitle: Create reusable training sessions with many exercises and per-set prescriptions.

plansPage.title: Workout plans
plansPage.subtitle: Arrange weekly training rhythm with weekday-based repetition.

libraryPage.title: Exercise library
libraryPage.subtitle: Find the right movement with anatomy visuals, muscle filters, and quick how-to steps.

exerciseCatalog.emptyBody: Try a broader search or clear one of the filters to reveal more movements.

inboxPage.title: Inbox
inboxPage.subtitle: Reminder history and in-app notices live here.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.subtitle: Control language, reminder time, push permissions, and account state.
settingsPage.reviewBody: Inspect live Mongo data for exercises, muscles, equipments, goals, and categories before you scale further.

reviewPage.title: Catalog review
reviewPage.subtitle: Review live data coming from Mongo and Cloudinary-backed URLs before approving the next content pass.
reviewPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by slug, English, or Vietnamese name
reviewPage.noResultsBody: Try a broader keyword or switch to a different collection.

uiAuditPage.title: AI UI audit
uiAuditPage.subtitle: Upload screenshots and let a vision model review hierarchy, clipping, overlap, spacing, and overall polish before you iterate again.
uiAuditPage.helper: This runs only in local/dev and calls the OpenAI Responses API from the server. It is meant for fast design QA, not for replacing manual product judgment.
uiAuditPage.emptyState: Add one or more screenshots to review this UI.
uiAuditPage.configHint: Requires OPENAI_API_KEY and optionally OPENAI_UI_REVIEW_MODEL in local env.
uiAuditPage.uploadHint: Upload up to 4 screenshots. Include the broken state, not only the ideal state.
uiAuditPage.errorTitle: Could not run the AI audit.
